case_title: SYLVIE KRAWEC VS. RAYMOND RIVERS et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRAWEC, SYLVIE
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-12-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-10-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE JUN-11-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT RIVERS, RAYMOND
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY ARMENDARIZ, GERALDINE
ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST OF MAR-06-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRAWEC, SYLVIE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, RAYMOND DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-28-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-24-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-13-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-16-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RIVERS, RAYMOND
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO FEB-19-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-16-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER AND STIPULATION TO EXTEND JURISDICION OF ARBITRATOR FOR AN ADDITIONAL 90 DAYS.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-06-2014.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-22-2013.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR STEPHEN JOSEPH GORSKI.
ARBITRATOR DAVID BERNARD LYNCH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-23-2013 THROUGH NOV-21-2013.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRAWEC, SYLVIE ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-05-2013. JUL-10-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
FEE PAID ON STIP AND ORDER TO EXTEND JURISDICTION OF ARBITRATOR AN ADDITIONAL 90 DAYS FILED BY DEFENDANT RIVERS, RAYMOND
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
